data.name: Zoe the Exhibitionist
data.detailed_description:
Story


Zoe has locked herself out of her house...naked. Your job is to help her make the right choices that'll lead her to clothes without being seen by too many people...that's chapter 1, anyway. Zoe also gets humiliated in a public gym and needs to take revenge against her new rival as well as survive the first day of her new job without embarrassing herself. Meanwhile, Itsuki is having trouble with naked anxiety dreams and trying to get people to take her seriously while Sarah just wants to have fun.

Features


- Voice Acting for all characters except male player characters
- 5 Chapters and 2 Mini Chapters
- 'A Night with Itsuki' included with this game (Chapter 4)
- Music and sound effects throughout
- Over 1,700 3D Rendered Images


A Night with Itsuki

Itsuki wants to chat. You'll need to type out suggested responses and say the right things to help her finish her project and fall in love with you while also playing strip games and daring each other to do things.

- 342 of the 1,700 3D Rendered Images
- Voice Acting
- Music and sound effects throughout


Lunafreyava as Zoe
Sarah Beth as Itsuki
Kristina Franek as Sarah
K98 as Tenma
Honey Vee as Ada
DollVa as Beth and Trish
shione as Kiri
kriptokitty as Laura
merrybella as Su
Misa as Torrie
MoonieVA as Miku
Lydia as Monica
btmnbrknhq as Minori
ivettexo as Charlotte
btmnbrknhq as Creepy Voice
Ivettexo as Irritable Woman
Lunafreya as Claire


•••••••••••• Music By •••••••••••••
"In a Pensive Mood''
''Indian Hop"
"With Loved Ones"
"Indie"
"Peace and People"

Jay Man - OurMusicBox

Sound effects obtained from zapsplat

data.short_description: Zoe has locked herself out of her house...naked. Your job is to help her make the right choices that'll lead her to clothes without being seen by too many people in a Choose-Your-Own-Adventure ENF-Themed game with over 1,700 3D Images and voice acting. Includes 'A Night With Itsuki'
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU with 2GB or more
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
